name: Odin Language Support
description: Adds the Odin language support and tools.

release.description: The Odin language release version to install. 'latest' for latest official release, 'master' for GitHub master.

os.description: The target operating system (when downloading, not compiling.

arch.description: The target architecture (when downloading, not compiling.

examples.description: Whether to install the Odin language example projects.

vscode-create-config.description: Whether to create a set of VS Code files.

ols-create-config.description: Whether to create a set of OLS configuration files.
